title: Chapter Eighty-Two: Battle for Possession
content:
## JEONG YEON-SHIN

The next day. Radiant Demon Wing's great practice ground.

The official notice came through the General Administration Office. A letter recording the next mission. Yeon-shin sat in the middle of the practice ground and opened the dispatch.

Seniors surrounded him in a circle, looking down with expressions caught between pride and worry.

"Lightning Genius' name is in the martial match delegation. It's really written there."

"Truly an honourable matter. If only I were ten years younger..."

He skipped the introduction. Checked the list.

*Execute the following five through life-and-death matches:*

Namgung family Flourishing Spirit Flower Master. Namgung family Young Master. Azure Heaven Sword Group Leader. Elder Council Lord. Namgung Family Head.

*The following main fortress warriors shall properly prepare:*

Obeying Heaven Wing White Qilin. Radiant Demon Wing Lightning Genius. Main Fortress Elder Council Lord. Desolate Ma Family Head. Divine Sword Group Leader.

His eyes widened.

*Divine Sword Group Leader?*

The being who always traversed the martial world. Supreme under the Sect Lord. The one whose legendary movements enthusiasts spoke of in whispers. He had not met the Group Leader once since entering Desolate Sect.

"Isn't the Group Leader out on a mission?"

"Even the direct Divine Sword Team has been away long. Rumours say they went to deal with Remaining Spirit."

"Then straight to the Namgung family without returning..."

*Thirteen Evil Sects. The world is vast.*

"Four days until departure," Cheong Myeong said. His single blue eye curved. "Even gathering what we have is urgent. Everyone should withdraw." He waved his hand, and a wind cold as sword steel blew. The masters withdrew in groups, each offering Yeon-shin a smile and quiet encouragement.

"Didn't you receive a lot from this return?" Cheong Myeong said. "You should organise before heading out again. For example -- things like spirit pills."

---

A world away, in South Zhili, a young woman approached the Namgung family's main gate.

Her deep blue martial robe caught the light. Dust rose like clouds beneath her footwork. Servants and warriors trailed behind her like an afterthought.

"Young Lady," the gate guard said. His face said she was newly dazzling.

"Uncle Jang-myeong, your complexion has bloomed. Did you drink something good?"

He bowed. "The one who has truly changed seems to be the Flourishing Spirit Flower Master. We congratulate your great achievement."

All five gate warriors paid respects as one. Passersby on the main road could not look away.

*The Namgung family's Flourishing Spirit Flower Master? But that lady's skin is completely white --*

*Human-Form Snow Ginseng. The mystical and cool energy even changed her skin.*

Namgung Mi heard it all. She paid it no mind. Their words were not wrong. She had taken the legendary ginseng -- because her brother and father had already filled their lower dantians and had no need.

She passed into the inner courtyard with a few light body technique steps, startling those she passed. Only direct bloodline were permitted movement techniques within the family walls.

She entered Azure Sky Hall. Guard warriors bowed at the waist.

"You've achieved small completion," said Namgung Se-jin without looking up from his documents. Azure Qilin. Calm eyes, high nose, features that could be called beautiful. He did not take his gaze from the papers.

She pulled over a chair, sat down heavily, crossed her legs.

"Everyone else calls it great completion."

"When Blood Flame Sect ambushed the main family, we had to empty our forces to find that ginseng. Your inner power achievement only bloats power. Compared to the sacrifice, it's just so-so."

Indifferent. That was her brother. She released her energy technique -- white streams brushing her entire body, documents shaking from the aftermath, cold wind wrapping her like a goddess of northern snow.

"The imperial watchdogs dared declare war on the main family? Even life-and-death matches?" She smiled. "Can the Divine Sword Group Leader defeat our father who achieved completion in the Emperor Sword Form?"

"Don't presume about peerless masters' affairs. As you know, you too were named. The challenge was announced across the Central Plains -- likely Desolate Sect's scheme. We cannot refuse. Spectators from across the martial world are set to gather."

"My beauty and title will become more widely known then." She leaned forward. "I heard our Hwa-sin is returning."

Se-jin furrowed his brow. "That child is your brother too."

"How can an illegitimate lowborn be?" She waved it away. "More than that -- the one who started the incident was on the list? The boy who used sound techniques that would only work on the weak. Lightning Genius or something."

"It's not martial arts to belittle. That was divine technique."

She ignored him with a small snort. "I want to make that child the touchstone of my achievement. Let's go see. Lightning Genius and White Qilin."

"You really intend to kill Ah-sin?"

"Not Ah-sin. *Hwa-sin*. He's not young anymore." Her ruby-red lips curved in the snow-white face. "I'll kill Lightning Genius first and end with Hwa-sin. With our brother's hypocrisy, you wouldn't want illegitimate blood on your hands."

"Does this little sister look like she'll lose?"

Se-jin stared at her. Shook his head.

"You won't lose."

---

Yeon-shin consumed the spirit pill in the middle of Radiant Demon Wing's great practice ground.

The hem of his blue martial robe fluttered endlessly. Energy waves deepened. Faint golden light clusters -- materialisation of true qi -- flashed and disappeared like distant lightning.

Ma Jin watched from the circle of guarding masters. Hyeon Won-chang stood with them.

*Leader, what is that colour?*

Ma Jin's sound transmission came steady: *I heard he established the foundation for creating cultivation techniques. It's not rare for rapidly increasing true qi to fan the sprouting of enlightenment. Perhaps a peerless heart technique might be born within this year.*

Hyeon Won-chang sent a sigh-laced breath.

*You send a sound transmission of a sigh? Maintain courtesy, Hyeon Won-chang.*

But the boy had already gathered his waves of true qi. Yeon-shin took a long breath, eyes still closed.

"Young Hero Jeong!"

"Young Hero Hyeon?"

"Is it finished?"

"Yes."

"I'm truly curious. How much stronger did you become?"

He opened his eyes. Abundant energy revealed itself as deep blue light in his pupils. The sky colour transforming into blue radiance.

"I'm not sure," the boy answered.

And meant it.

---
